# use-chrome-ai

Headless primitives for Chrome's built-in AI (Gemini Nano). The library runs in the
browser, uses no API keys, ships no UI, and supports the framework-agnostic core plus
React and Vue adapters. For Chrome setup, API status, requirements, and model-management
details, point readers to Chrome's docs instead of restating them here.

Install:

- Core: `npm i use-chrome-ai`
- React: `npm i @use-chrome-ai/react`
- Vue: `npm i @use-chrome-ai/vue`

The React and Vue adapters re-export the core.

## Chrome Docs

- Built-in AI overview: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/built-in
- API status: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/built-in-apis
- Get started: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/get-started
- Inform users of model download: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/inform-users-of-model-download
- Model management: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/understand-built-in-model-management
- Prompt API: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/prompt-api
- Summarizer API: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/summarizer-api
- Writer API: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/writer-api
- Rewriter API: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/rewriter-api
- Proofreader API: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/proofreader-api
- Translator API: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/translator-api
- Language Detector API: https://developer.chrome.com/docs/ai/language-detection

## Library Rules

- Gate UI on `model.isUnavailable` or the core controller snapshot.
- When availability is `"downloadable"`, render a button and call `download()` from that
  button.
- Hooks never reject; read `error`. Core controller methods do reject.
- Streaming hooks write into `messages` (`useChat`) or `result` (task hooks). Abort with
  `stop()`.

## Docs

- [README](./README.md): short overview, package table, one React example, demos.
- [Core](./docs/core.md): vanilla JS, controller store, task APIs, compact reference.
- [React](./docs/react.md): hooks, model status, examples, signatures.
- [Vue](./docs/vue.md): chat composable, core controller binding, signatures.

## Packages

- `use-chrome-ai`: `createChat`, `createLanguageModel`, `createSummarizer`,
  `createWriter`, `createRewriter`, `createProofreader`, `createTranslator`,
  `createLanguageDetector`, capability helpers, stream helpers, shared types.
- `@use-chrome-ai/react`: `useChat`, `usePrompt`, `useSummarizer`, `useWriter`,
  `useRewriter`, `useProofreader`, `useTranslator`, `useLanguageDetector`,
  `useModelStatus`, `useAiController`.
- `@use-chrome-ai/vue`: `useChat`, `useModelStatus`, plus all core exports.
